station_toolpacks_station_slug_unique.name: station_toolpacks_station_slug_unique
station_toolpacks_station_slug_unique.where: deleted IS NULL AND "station_toolpacks"."builtin_slug" IS NOT NULL

station_toolpacks_station_orgtp_unique.name: station_toolpacks_station_orgtp_unique
station_toolpacks_station_orgtp_unique.where: deleted IS NULL AND "station_toolpacks"."organization_toolpack_id" IS NOT NULL

tiers_charges_nonneg.name: tiers_charges_nonneg
tiers_charges_nonneg.value:
("tiers"."free_units_per_period" IS NULL OR "tiers"."free_units_per_period" >= 0)
        AND ("tiers"."metered_units_per_period" IS NULL OR "tiers"."metered_units_per_period" >= 0)
        AND ("tiers"."expensive_units_per_period" IS NULL OR "tiers"."expensive_units_per_period" >= 0)
        AND ("tiers"."free_rate_per_min" IS NULL OR "tiers"."free_rate_per_min" >= 0)
        AND ("tiers"."metered_rate_per_min" IS NULL OR "tiers"."metered_rate_per_min" >= 0)
        AND ("tiers"."expensive_rate_per_min" IS NULL OR "tiers"."expensive_rate_per_min" >= 0)
